meta.sprint_theme: TV Memory Layer, Input Hub, and Partner Credit Marketplace

items.title: MCP Input Hub with context learning
items.description: Full screenshot and file ingestion system with OCR, context extraction, and smart routing
prototype_goals: Extract context via OCR + window title metadata
Route to correct project/focus based on content
Learn from user corrections to improve routing
Integrate with MCP server for seamless workflow
items.success_criteria: Can auto-route 80% of screenshots correctly without manual intervention

deliverables: OCR integration (Apple Vision API or Tesseract)

technical_notes.context_extraction: More challenging than inbox JSON - screenshots have visual + text content, need window title, OCR, and potentially image classification
technical_notes.routing_complexity: Can't rely on explicit metadata like inbox JSON. Need to infer project/focus from screenshot content and context
technical_notes.learning_system: Track user corrections (when they move files) to improve routing accuracy over time
technical_notes.integration: Should use shared ingestion core from refactor-001 to avoid duplication with inbox system

user_requirements.context_challenge: Even more complex than inbox ingestion

items.title: Project 8825 TV Memory Layer
items.description: TV Memory Layer thought experiment - bookmark model with Siri-first interface for passive memory capture and retrieval
prototype_goals: Design bookmark-based memory model for TV content
Build Siri-first interface for passive capture
Integrate with existing achievement detection patterns
items.success_criteria: Can capture and retrieve TV-based memories via Siri without manual input

ai_analysis.recommendation: Refactor existing patterns to integrate TV memory layer rather than adding parallel system

questions: Should this be system-wide or focus-specific (Team76)?
Should we refactor existing achievement detection to include TV memories?
How does this integrate with current Joju mining patterns?

technical_notes.integration_challenge: Affects core Joju achievement detection - needs careful integration
technical_notes.scope_decision: System-wide scope but Team76 target - needs clarification
technical_notes.pattern_refactor: May require refactoring achievement_detection.json to support TV memories

items.title: Partner Credit Marketplace
items.description: Multi-partner credit exchange and automation marketplace with revenue sharing
prototype_goals: Extend credit system to multiple partners (Team76, etc.)
Track revenue share from external licensing
items.success_criteria: Can exchange credits across 3+ partners and license automations with automated revenue tracking

technical_notes.multi_partner_challenge: Need to track credit balances across multiple partner pairs, not just Smart/HCSS
technical_notes.marketplace_complexity: Automation catalog must support licensing, usage tracking, and revenue distribution
technical_notes.governance_scaling: Steering group model needs to scale beyond 2 partners
